title: Audit each typelift package for substrate-relevance + recommend fork action
description: Phase B.2 of typelift-substrate-modernization. Depends on `author-maintainer-vendor-audit-schema-family` (typed shape) and `vendor-typelift-org-as-maintainers-submodules` (vendored copies to read). For each typelift package, author a MaintainerVendorAuditModel instance covering: is the IDEA substrate-relevant? is the IMPLEMENTATION still load-bearing or has Apple subsumed it (Sendable / structured concurrency / Result types)? does substrate already have an equivalent primitive (per `[[substrate-refinement-primitive-vocabulary]]`)? recommended action (fork-modernize / adopt-pattern-fresh / archive-as-reference / skip)? priority ranking (1-5) for fork queue. Output: one audit JSON file per package at `private/universal/substrate/collectives/clia-org/agenda/typelift-audits/<package>.audit.json`. Substrate's priority assumptions from session context: SwiftCheck = 1, Aquila/Focus/Operadics = 2, Algebra = 3, Swiftx/Basis = 4, Concurrent (obsoleted by Apple) = skip-or-5. Verify these against actual repo state.
